creator: marcel@herrbischoff.com
text:
(In reply to Ronald Klop from comment #6)
To me, it looks like an accidental artifact that somehow made its way to the release tarball. It appears to have appeared in 4.7.3. I believe this can/should be removed but I will check with the author. This is either intentional or should be fixed upstream.

Also interesting that I didn't encounter this issue on my local system. You're building with Poudriere I suppose?
